nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Giant white-eye
nodes.summary: Giant white-eye（Giant white-eye，学名 Megazosterops palauensis），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species is currently classified as Near Threatened by the IUCN due to likely habitat loss and the possibility of the establishment of the invasive Brown tree snake on the island.The Giant White-eye is13-14cm large

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Changing weather patterns because of climate change may also threaten the species in the future
